titleStmt.title: SII 37.457: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 457. (A.R. No. B 24 of 1942-43.) Pagiḍyāla, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up near the primary school.
This is dated in Śaka 1477, Rākshasa, Śrāvaṇa ba. 5, corresponding to 1555 A.D., August 7, Wednesday.

It registers the grant made by the three Vipravinōdins Anaṁtayya, Govindayya and mādhavayya, of a portion of their annual incomes (Varttana) bestowed upon their community by the Mahājanas of the place to god Kēśava Perumāḷ of Payiṇḍālu alias Bhāvanārāyaṇapuram which was included in the Mosalimaḍugu-sīma and belonged to Kandāḷa Śrīraṅgāchārya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1477
Agunēṭi rākṣasa saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa ba 5 lu . śrīmadrājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī sadāsivadēva
mahārāyaluṁgāru vijayanagaramaṁdu pṛthivī sā
mrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu mōsalimaḍugu śīmalō kaṁthā
ḷa śrīraṁggācāryulu Ayyavāri payiṁḍālu pratināma
maina bhāvanārāyaṇapuraṁ Akilāṁḍakōṭi brahmāṁḍḍanā
yakuṁḍaina kēśava perumāḷaku kāsyapagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbhasū
traṁ yajuśākādhyāyulaina cāgalamarri vipravinōdi
mallaya pautṛṁḍaina vallabhaya putṛṁḍaina Anaṁtayya
nu vasiṣṭha gōtraṁ Āpastaṁbha sūtraṁ yajuśākādhyāyulaina
tūrpunāṭi maṁtramūrti pedavīraya pautṛṁḍaina pinavīra
ya putṛṁḍaina gōviṁdayyānu śrīvatsagōtraṁ
Āpastaṁbha sūtraṁ yajuśākādhyāyulaina tūrpunā
ṭi maṁtramūti vallabhaya pautruṁḍaina mādhava pu
tṛṁḍaina sina mādhavayyā jana 3 guru sāṣṭāṁgga daṁḍamulu
samarpiṁcci dhāravōsi samarpiṁccina dharma śāsanaṁ . mī grā
mānnu sthitāśēṣa vidvanmahājanālunu mā vipravinōdu
lakellānu yiccē varttanalu saṁkrāṁtti mahōtsavānu dhāra
vōsi samarpiṁstimi . trivācakaṁgānu mā vipravinōdula
kellānu punyaṁgānu mahājanālu Iccē vartana yeḍokaṁ
ṭiki 4 lakanu perumāḷa mahōtsavānaku samarapiṁcca ka
ṭaḍaśestimi gāna yī dharmānaku yē vipravinōdi tappi va
rtanalu Aḍiginā tama tallidaṁḍḍilānu gōvubrāhma
lānu vāraṇāśilōnu vadhiṁcina pāpānaṁ bō
vuvāru śunakamāṁsaṁ surāpānaṁ sēviṁccu
vāru maṁgaḷamāśrījeyā mādavayya vrālu
Anaṁtayyavrālu gōviṁdayyavrālu
Digital edition of SII 37.457 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
